description: Original use: Fragment of a Qaraite ketubba or at least a marriage-related document: "... and they will act in accordance with the traditions of the Qaraites... and they will not resort to Muslim courts...." Bride: [Sitt] al-Ahl bt. Yosef. (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
